<Heading

  children={"Get all contractor bank accounts"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/contractors/{contractor_uuid}/bank_accounts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all contractor bank accounts.

scope: `contractor_payment_methods:read`
